title: d2c IR Token Map
description: Model-authored file mapping Figma node IDs to per-property token references. Every value is a dotted path into design-tokens.json (e.g. 'colors.primary', 'spacing.md') OR the special marker '__LIBRARY_BOUNDARY__:<token_path>:<hex_value>' for values that must be hardcoded due to library API limitations (e.g. SVG chart fill props). Unknown references must fail validation and trigger STOP AND ASK.

schema_version.description: IR artifact schema version. MUST match schema_version in all other IR artifacts (run-manifest, component-match, layout). Validator rejects mismatches.

nodes.description: Map of Figma node ID to a flat object of { cssPropertyOrSemanticName: dottedTokenPath | libraryBoundaryMarker }.

additionalProperties.description: Dotted path into design-tokens.json (e.g. 'colors.primary'), OR library boundary marker '__LIBRARY_BOUNDARY__:<token_path>:<hex_value>' for values that cannot use CSS variables due to library API constraints (e.g. recharts SVG fill props). Boundary markers are exempt from the Phase 5 hardcoded-values audit.
